SYNTHETIC PELVIC ULTRASOUND REPORT
Patient ID: SYNTH-DOC-0004
Examination date: 2024-07-19

FINDINGS
-------
Right ovary volume: 7.9 mL
Right ovary: 9 antral follicles
Left ovary volume: 8.4 mL
Left ovary: 11 antral follicles
A simple cystic structure is noted in the left adnexa

IMPRESSION: Limited visualisation of the left ovary; findings are indeterminate.

End of synthetic report.
